items.title: Police say they believe abducted child was murdered as body found in Outback
items.dek: The five-year-old girl was last seen on Saturday at an Aboriginal town camp near Alice Springs.
items.body: The five-year-old girl was last seen on Saturday at an Aboriginal town camp near Alice Springs.

items.title: Oil jumps to highest price since 2022 after report Trump to be briefed on new Iran options
items.dek: Axios reported that US Central Command has prepared a plan for a wave of "short and powerful" strikes on Iran.
